mapper.sql:
business_domain_id IS NULL
AND word LIKE #{keywordLike}
mapper.select: SELECT id, business_domain_id, word, created_at FROM blocked_word WHERE business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, business_domain_id, word, created_at FROM blocked_word WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, business_domain_id, word, created_at FROM blocked_word WHERE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, business_domain_id, word, created_at FROM blocked_word WHERE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blocked_word WHERE business_domain_id IS NULL AND word = #{word}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blocked_word (business_domain_id, word, created_at) VALUES (#{businessDomainId}, #{word}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
